This '''[[Space station/Legends|space station]]''' was a pyramid-shaped structure in orbit around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tahlboor]].

Around [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]], the station was used as a meeting ground for diplomatic discussions between [[Troob]]s, [[Hobor]]s, and the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]]. It was from the station that [[Nimondro]] first demonstrated the power of the [[sky cannon]]. After the demonstration, the delegates agreed to leave the station and head to the surface aboard a Troob [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]].

Level Seven of the space station was known as the game room. It featured dining and gaming machines, including at least five [[credit game]] devices and a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] table.

{{Station-stub}}
